reviews.review_description:
I'm really upset a lot of games choose Roblox graphics and that doesn't make me want to play with VR. 

At the same time decent graphics don't save bad games. Like this one. 

Games need contractors or cod mobile like Graphic. The gameplay however is always more important. The more restrictive a VR game is, it's less suitable for VR and more suitable for flatscreen.

so i got this game for free, to try out and finished it in about 20 mins 
atmosphere of this game is amazing, sand, and music does give you this sad and alone feeling, and art style help too, what this game need is a lot and a lot of polish, from control, more story, and similar stuff
in general currently game plays like this, you have open room and you need to get to the end, and next room and next room , this did remind me of really old pc games, in a good way , this game just need more polish, maybe more story, and it set for greatness, i will update this game in a year to see how it progressed
This game kinda garbo, you walk slow af and die with like 2 hits.
Nice and different experience, really cool alien world. Sometimes really unforgiving combat!
